description: Kha Nguyen, co-founder of Bird Eye, presents updates at Breakpoint 2024, highlighting significant user engagement and new features for their platform.
topic_summary: At [t=4:56], Kha Nguyen introduces Bird Eye's achievements in 2024, including 24 million retail users and 44 million daily API requests. He announces three major upgrades: a faster interface, customizable dashboards with Birdeye Panel, and a new mobile app with instant notifications, all set to launch in October 2024.
